text_block_list.text:
On the way to my office, I hear a shrill voice—one
that I recognize.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Impressive, Fuji.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you as well, Opera O! Your performance
moved me to my core.
choice_data_list: Uh, is there a show going on?
Uh, is there a show going on?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, dance practice—no! Dare I say, a dance
battle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have added my own personal flair to the
assigned piece, to create my one and only
Operatic Dance of Brilliance!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And I, on the other hand, have maintained the
original choreography in my Dance of Mighty
Expression!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
"Whose dance would sway the most hearts?" We
engaged in a duel to answer that very question.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm an entertainer of sorts, the challenge
struck a chord with me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Student Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Fuji won, hands down!
No, Opera O's dance was better!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Could this be... a draw? What are we to do? A
duet would be called for at times like this in a
play.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh! I've got it... Trainer! To the stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A good dance does not only allure, it entices all
who see it to dance along.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How right you are! In other words, your trainer
will choose which of us compels others to dance
the most.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! Now, choose! The Operatic Dance of
Brilliance or the Dance of Mighty Expression!
choice_data_list: The Operatic Dance of Brilliance, of course.
The Dance of Mighty Expression, I guess!

text_block_list.text:
Consider me one of the many who's been
mesmerized by T.M. Opera O's unique
perspective!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My dear trainer! I knew you understood my allure!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now let us dance! Allow my radiant presence to
ignite your body and soul!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, step... Now do a shining pose! Ready,
and—sha-bliiing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, so that is your pose of brilliance! Then... I shall pose like this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I must admit defeat! You two are completely
in sync—on many levels. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Superb, Trainer. It was a fruitful battle,
to be sure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The possibilities of dance truly blossom as a duet.
Your pose of brilliance led me to realize this.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In winning concerts, we dance the dance of
runners. And of course, as the Overlord, with me
at the center.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must shimmer with soul fire so as to illuminate
those who accompany me onstage—for the
Overlord brings out the brilliance of others!

It appears she's learned the importance of
performing with her fellow dancers while
expressing herself onstage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?!

Yes, originality is important, but you have to
master the fundamentals first.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored that you would choose me. Please,
be gentle!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, wonderful footwork! And... considerably
cunning of you as well!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Don't tell me you don't feel that piercing
gaze. You've lit a flame inside her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? The song has ended. That was a joyful little
moment we had. For now, so long!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Impressive. I felt the potential of your
expressiveness.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And yet... you're so timid.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Surely, you felt too bashful to pair with my
astounding beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Of course, I am the pinnacle of perfection, so you are quite forgiven. But you must steel yourself for next time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For when you take this hand, the beauty of my
dance will have you forget all those fears!

Not choosing T.M. Opera O as my partner has
increased her motivation to dance.
